Created attachment 159674
sharfile

Mojolicious::Plugin::AssetPack is a module allowing a Mojolicious
application to compress and convert css, less, sass, javascript
and coffeescript files.

WWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/Mojolicious-Plugin-AssetPack/


Tested as a dependency of a perl webapp
